poetry.title: A village landay about departure
poetry.summary: A short landay-style note about migration, distance, and the emotional cost of leaving home.
poetry.body: This submission preserves a short oral-style line remembered in family gatherings. It is offered as a cultural note rather than a formally sourced printed text, and the editorial value is in documenting emotional language around travel, parting, and memory.

names.title: بریالۍ
names.summary: Meaning: successful or accomplished. A name associated with aspiration, dignity, and achievement.
names.body: This name is used with a positive sense of accomplishment and good outcome. It fits the site library because it connects naming practice with family values, encouragement, and public identity rather than only dictionary meaning.
names.region: Widely understood across Afghan and diaspora Pashto families
